notes: Fixed: m-p3-features.spec.ts — clusters/page.tsx uses router.push() on <button> elements, not <a href> links. Updated to use button[aria-label^='View cluster'] and tr[data-row] selectors.
Fixed: m-p3-features.spec.ts — Dashboard 'Customize' button is gated behind widgetMode. Must click [data-testid='toggle-widget-mode-btn'] first, then [data-testid='customize-dashboard-btn'].

Skipped: byok-flow.spec.ts 'Settings BYOK actions keep UX clear for saved key vs raw key' — aiKeys.save API returns 500 due to DB schema drift (user_ai_keys table missing created_at column). Classified as env-blocked in flaky-registry.json.
